name: Ealixir, Inc.
summary: Flint Telecom Group, Inc. is a Nevada Corporation providing next-generation turnkey voice, data, and wireless telecom services through partner channels primarily in the United States. Operating through four subsidiaries, it distributes broadband equipment, prepaid international calling cards, VoIP telephony solutions for SMEs, and white-label telecom services for cable companies and ISPs. Its three business segments are telecom software/services/equipment, prepaid telecom services, and subscriber-based VoIP and cellular services.

products.name: Cable and Voice Corporation broadband equipment
products.description: Cable modems, Wi-Fi hardware, VoIP adapters, IP telephones, and other customer premise equipment distributed to cable, telecom, and enterprise customers.

products.name: Phone House international calling cards
products.description: Prepaid discount calling cards enabling calls to China, India, Mexico, Africa, South America, Brazil, Bangladesh, distributed through 10,000+ retail outlets.

products.name: Digital Phone Solutions Enhanced IP Telephony
products.description: Suite of IP telephony solutions for SMEs including voicemail-to-email, free inter-office calling, virtual phone numbers, billing, and customer care.

products.name: Flint Prepaid calling services
products.description: Branded prepaid calling cards and services sold through master distributors and retailers, targeting immigrant customers making international calls.

products.name: White-label convergent telecom services
products.description: Outsourced full-service telecom solution (voice, data, wireless) for independent cable companies, ISPs, and VARs including billing and service provisioning.

products.name: Wireless IP and telecom expense management applications
products.description: Applications for large multinational enterprises and telecom operators worldwide for telecom expense management.
